differences.title: 1. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Pages export data fetching functions; pre-rendering focus.
differences.rightDesc: Routes export loaders; runs on server or client.

differences.title: 2. RENDERING
differences.leftDesc: Supports SSR, SSG, ISR, and client-side rendering.

differences.title: 3. ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Pages directory dictates routes. App Router adds more.
differences.rightDesc: Routes directory dictates routes. Dynamic segments supported.

differences.title: 4. DATA MUTATIONS
differences.leftDesc: Separate API routes or integrated Server Actions.

differences.title: 5. CODE SPLITTING
differences.leftDesc: Splits based on pages/routes for efficient loading.
differences.rightDesc: Splits code based on routes and dynamic imports.

differences.title: 6. STYLING
differences.leftDesc: Supports CSS Modules, Tailwind, Styled Components, etc.
differences.rightDesc: Prefers CSS Modules, global CSS, and style imports.

differences.title: 7. DEPLOYMENT
differences.leftDesc: Excellent integration with Vercel, but versatile.
